## Branch Protection

This repository uses automated branch protection. The following required status
checks are configured to prevent publishing unless all platform tests pass:

{REQUIRED_CHECKS_LIST}

### Bootstrap

Run once after repository creation (requires admin access and `gh` CLI):

```bash
bash scripts/install-branch-protection.sh
```
